title: senecio × baxteri
intro: Senecio × baxteri, also known as Baxter's ragwort or hybrid groundsel, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an expectorant, helping to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio × baxteri include its potential to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Senecio × baxteri can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
